---
title: "**CV**"
editor: visual
---

You can find a complete version of my CV [here]().

## Education 

- PhD in Economics, Université Libre de Bruxelles (ECARES), 2021 - Ongoing 
- Mres in Economics, Université Libre de Bruxelles (ECARES), 2019 - 2021
- Msc in Economics, Double Degree Program, LUISS University of Rome & Solvay Brussels Schools of Economics and Managements 2017 - 2019
- Bsc in Economics and Managements, LUISS University of Rome, 2014 - 2017
